paper_title: Law of large number for one dimensional Markov process

entities.id: Law of large number for one dimensional Markov process
entities.description: The main research problem focusing on the convergence of a 1D Markov process.
A stochastic process with the state space Z where future states depend only on the current state.
A theorem that describes the result of performing the same experiment a large number of times.
A special case of continuous-time Markov process where the state transitions are of only two types: births and deaths.
An operator that describes the movement of the Markov process at an infinitesimal time.
A probabilistic inequality used to prove convergence in probability.
The analytical method used to solve for the limit and rate of convergence.
The specific speed at which the process converges to the constant G.
The general field of study including probability theory.
Lead author of the research paper.

entities.id: College of Natural Sciences, Can Tho University

entities.description: The university where the research was conducted.
